title: How Would a Blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Work? Here Are Some Possibilities.
summary_full: The goal of the naval operation ordered by President Trump is to deny Iran the revenues it needs to fund its military, but there are many unknowns.
summary_public: The goal of the naval operation ordered by President Trump is to deny Iran the revenues it needs to fund its military, but there are many unknowns.
